objective: Enforce EXECUTION_SUMMARY_ARTIFACT_V1, human confirmation, and authorization before execution-capable transitions.
enforcement_points_added: Execution authorization now creates or validates EXECUTION_SUMMARY_ARTIFACT_V1 and summary-bound human confirmation before EXECUTION_AUTHORIZATION_ARTIFACT_V1.
Governed worker execution now creates or validates EXECUTION_SUMMARY_ARTIFACT_V1 and confirmation before WORKER_EXECUTION_RESULT_ARTIFACT_V1.
Native provider execution now creates or validates EXECUTION_SUMMARY_ARTIFACT_V1 and confirmation before provider request and invocation.
Domain lifecycle approvals now require execution summary and human confirmation lineage.
Capability lifecycle approvals now require execution summary and human confirmation lineage.
Capability attachment approvals now require execution summary and human confirmation lineage.
Replay-derived improvement approvals now create execution summary and confirmation lineage.
Implementation-plan-to-execution-request creation now fails closed if improvement approval lacks summary-bound confirmation lineage.

coverage.development_execution: Native provider execution and filesystem/repository mutation authorization surfaces are summary-bound or approval-lineage guarded.
coverage.worker_execution: Execution authorization and governed worker execution emit/validate execution summary and confirmation lineage.
coverage.domain_operations: Domain lifecycle approval validation requires summary-bound confirmation lineage.
coverage.capability_operations: Capability lifecycle and attachment approval validation requires summary-bound confirmation lineage.
coverage.replay_derived_improvements: Improvement approval creates summary-bound confirmation lineage and execution request creation requires it.

governance_impact_statement: Execution-capable transitions now have a runtime-visible execution summary boundary. The repair preserves existing governance, replay, provider non-authority, authorization boundaries, and fail-closed semantics while adding summary-bound human confirmation evidence.
